---
title: "Hydrogen Production"
---

Hydrogen production covers the entire electrolyser.
In this work, always a PEM electrolyser is studied.

The electrolyser is split up in the following components: 
* stack
* power electronics 
* balance of plant (BOP) 
Note that in most contexts, the balance of plants includes the power electronics, but here they are explictly treated separately.

The compressor is not included in this section, but is under [Hydrogen Infrastructure: Compressor](../hydrogen_infra/compressor.qmd)

The hydrogen production model is dynamic: stack efficiency and auxiliary power consumption depend on operating point, which depends on the wind state and the installed stack capacity.



## Current Component Cost Basis

| Component | Cost at 15 MW | Scaling factor |
|---|---:|---:|
| Stack | 100 EUR/kW | 1.00 |
| Non-electrical BOP | 380 EUR/kW | 0.60 |
| Power electronics | 87 EUR/kW | 1.00 |

The cost basis is derived from NREL assumptions, converted from 2020 USD to 2025 EUR, with a markup applied to represent sales price rather than production cost.
